_note: Real Israeli stock, seeded from supplier listings. Editable per supplier. Sizes mm. usable_sheet = plan-against size after kerf+edge; nominal_sheet = stock size. `rgb` is a display default read by render.py/draw.py/sketchup_emit.py — add a material here and its colour propagates to all views.

plywood_birch.notes: actual ~1mm under label; clean exposed edge

veneered_panels._note: Sheet good (ply or MDF core) faced both sides with a real wood veneer, sold as sheets. Veneer both faces to balance the panel or it cups. Exposed edges need solid lipping or matching iron-on edgebanding. Core option is a choice — ply for screw-holding edges, MDF for a flatter face. Confidence: moderate (availability/price vary by supplier).

white_oak_veneer.lipping: solid white-oak lipping or matching edgeband on exposed edges

oak_veneer.lipping: solid oak lipping or matching edgeband

walnut_veneer.lipping: solid walnut lipping or matching edgeband

ash_veneer.lipping: solid ash lipping or matching edgeband

solid_hardwoods._note: Solid lumber by species. Sold as boards, not sheets — `board_stock_max` is a generous single-board footprint for the cut-list fit check, NOT a nesting sheet; wide tops are edge-glued from narrower boards. Finished = nominal - plane loss (see solid_lumber). Availability/section sizes vary by mill; confidence: moderate, confirm before ordering.

white_oak.notes: hard, stable, common for tables/legs; edge-glue for wide tops

ash.notes: light, tough, good for bent/curved work

beech.notes: hard, cheap, common IL; steam-bends well

solid_lumber._note: nominal cm sections sold un-planed; finished = nominal - plane_loss per dimension. plane_loss ASSUMED, confidence low, confirm with mill.

fixtures._note: Non-cut objects placed in a spec via Carcass.fixture()/kind='fixture' to drive clearances and views (a TV, appliance, mattress, sink). Never enter the cut list or joinery. Muted display tone.

drawer_mounts._note: box_width = cabinet_clear_opening - opening_minus. Confirm exact value from runner datasheet.

undermount_softclose.notes: Blum Tandem/Hettich; hidden; notch box back

metal_system.notes: Blum Antaro/Legrabox; no ply sides, buy unit; shop makes front+bottom(+back)
